title: Revise execution plan for project calibration and update recalibration review

sources.reason: User-provided review material defining project calibration and update recalibration requirements.
Previous serial remediation plan and its 14-work-item sequence.
Canonical governance terminology and repository boundaries.
Required Work Item lifecycle and closure rules.

riskAssessment.reason: The change creates a review-backed execution plan only; it does not implement runtime behavior. The primary risk is omitting a review requirement or weakening the mandated Work Item lifecycle.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized preparation of the revised execution plan and explicitly required the final cleanup work item.

preReviewWarnings: Verify that the review summary, authorized actions, 14-work-item sequence, full PR/branch-cleanup loop, and final plan cleanup are explicit.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Review material is converted into a complete serial execution plan
The final Work Item is explicitly plan-document cleanup
Runtime implementation and PR execution outcomes
scenarioCoverage.reason: This Work Item authors the execution plan; runtime changes and their PR evidence belong to the listed future Work Items.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The revised plan records the review conclusion, calibrated scope, residual risks, and explicitly authorized actions in sections 一、评审收查与总结 and 二、已经得到的授权.
The plan lists all 14 work items in serial order and ends with 清理执行计划文档.
The plan requires every work item to complete Contract → verification → Summary → ai-finish → PR → merge → ai-close-work-item → branch cleanup → base synchronization before the next work item starts.

The plan explicitly requires initial calibration, update impact assessment, preserved confirmations, candidate activation, drift revalidation, and fail-closed readiness in sections 一、评审收查与总结、三、每个工单的强制完整流程、五、计划级完成定义 and 六、首次校准与更新重新校准的最终验收.
guidelines: Keep the plan auditable and repository/project neutral where the review material does not provide implementation facts.
Do not present user authorization or proposal text as execution evidence; actual PR, merge, release, digest, and branch-cleanup evidence must be recorded when the work items execute.

intent.problem: The received project-calibration review contains a broad specification but the repository needs one auditable execution plan that turns it into ordered Work Items and prevents lifecycle shortcuts.
constraints: Keep the review conclusion and product boundary accurate.
Require a complete PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and base synchronization loop for every Work Item.
Make plan cleanup the final Work Item and preserve historical evidence.
intent.rationale: A single serial plan makes the review actionable while preserving evidence boundaries and ensuring the next Work Item starts only after the previous one is fully closed.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete Work Item lifecycle and its required governance decision evidence.

rollbackNote: Revert the plan document and this Work Item's governance records together; do not delete historical plans or evidence without a separate authorized cleanup Work Item.
